💡 Task Editor Help

Task Types

Sequential-JS (Implicit): Normal async code. Auto-pauses on fetch() or __callHostTool__(). Best for simple workflows.
FlowState (Explicit): Define states and transitions. Use for complex logic with branching/loops.
Sequential-OS (Container): Run shell commands in container. For system operations.

✨ Features

Format Code: Ctrl+Shift+F - Auto-indent your code
Extract Parameters: Configuration tab → Extract from Code button
JSON Validation: Test tab shows green/red indicators
Run Task: F5 or Ctrl+Enter

Common Patterns

HTTP Request: Use fetch() and Sequential auto-pauses on response
Call Tool: await __callHostTool__('toolName', params)
Error Handling: try/catch or onError in flow state

Input Parameters

Define parameters in Configuration tab. Your function receives input object. Example: function myTask(input) { input.userId, input.email, etc }

Testing

Enter JSON in Test tab matching your parameters. Green border = valid, red border = invalid. Cannot run with invalid JSON.
